Details.body:
USA Officially Withdraws from World Health Organization
USA accounts for about 18% fund impact

Former President of India Ram Nath Kovind launched the Responsible Nations Index (RNI).
Singapore topped, India 16th

India Largest Producer of - Papaya, mango, banana
2nd - vegetable producer
1st Producer & consumer of Spices
1st - coconut and arecanut producer

India’s fish production more than doubled over the past decade
rising 106% from 95.79 lakh tonnes in Financial Year 2013-14 (FY14) to 197.75 lakh tonnes in FY 2024-25 (FY25)

Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR), in Bengaluru developed the first-ever supercomputer-powered simulation to model the Mpemba effect.
Mpemba Effect: Hot water freezes faster than cold water

India-Pakistan Exchange Nuclear Lists on Jan 1, 2026 (35th Time)
under Prohibition of Attack against Nuclear Installations and Facilities between India and Pakistan

Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana, launch - January 01, 2017
- financial support to pregnant and lactating mothers

‘PM RAHAT Scheme’ for Road Accident Victims
cashless treatment up to Rs 1.5 lakh per victim for 7 days from the date of accident.

DoP - new 8 postage stamps -
Kathputli (Rj),
Yakshagana Sutrada Gombeyatta (Kt),
Benir Putul, Daanger Putul (WB),
Ravanachhaya, Kathi Kundhei (Odisha),
Pavakathakali (Kerala),
Tolu Bommalatta (AP).

India to acquire 114 Rafale fighter jets from France. (18 delivery + 96 make in India)
Currently 36 in IAF + 26 in IN
Will total 176

‘White Revolution 2.0’ by Mo Cooperation
to increase milk procurement by dairy cooperatives by 50% over the next 5 years 28-29

India’s Nationally Determined Contribution (NDC) for the period 2031–2035:
- Emissions: Reduce GDP emissions intensity by 47% by 2035 compared to 2005 levels, building on the 36% reduction achieved during 2005 to 2020.
- Non-Fossil: Achieve 60% of installed electric power capacity of non-fossil fuel by 2035, following the 52.57% capacity already reached by February 2026.
- Carbon Sink: Create an additional 3.5 – 4 billion tonnes of CO₂ equivalent through forest and tree cover by 2035, increasing from the 2.29 billion tonnes achieved by 2021.

Railways (MoR) approved two major rail infrastructure projects:
- Kosamba Rail Over Rail (RoR) Flyover in Gujarat
- Bhagalpur Bypass in Bihar

India’s current installed power generation capacity is 520 Gigawatt (GW) (as of 31 January 2026)
Will rise to 1,121 GW by 2035–36

India’s installed power generation capacity is projected to rise from 520 GW (as of 31 January 2026) to 1,121 GW by 2035–36
with peak electricity demand expected to reach 459 GW with Compound Annual Growth Rate of 5.58%
and total electricity requirement increasing to 3,365 BU (CAGR: 6.41%) between Financial Year 2024-25(FY25) and FY36.

As per the FAE of 2025-26, the total area under the horticulture production is 301.31 lakh ha.
A 10.50 lakh ha (3.61%) increase.

NITI's 2 new reports -
“Ease of Doing Research & Development in India”
“Survey Report on Ease of Doing R&D in India”

NITI's 2 New Initiative -
Atal Tinkering Lab (ATL) Sarthi
Mentor India Academy

India Ranks 4th Globally in Tech Funding with USD 11.7 Billion in FY26
reflecting an 18% decline from USD 14.3 billion in FY25 but a 20% increase over USD 9.7 billion in FY24.

‘Vikram-1’, India’s first privately built orbital rocket developed by Skyroot Aerospace Private Limited, from its Max-Q campus in Hyderabad, Telangana to the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in Sriharikota, AP

NITI's - Digital Public Infrastructure
DPI 2.0 - 2025 to 35
DPI 3.0 - 2035 to 47
4% GDP Rise by 30

Ladakh total 7 District
Old 2 - Leh, Kargil.
New 5 - Nubra, Sham, Changthang, Zanskar, and Drass.

Google Cloud India Artificial Intelligence (AI) Hub in Tarluvada, Visakhapatnam, AP.
(15B USD - India's Largest Single FDI)

India Becomes 5th-Largest Military Spender
USD 92.1 billion, 8.9% increase from the previous year, accounting for 3.2% of global spending.

Global Forest Report 2026
Fuelwood Demand Emerges as Major Driver of Global Forest Loss followed by agriculture expansion
South America and Africa show highest loss

Bhopal Introduces India’s 1st Solar-Powered ‘Algae Tree’ to Tackle Air Pollution
1 unit of algae tree = 25 mature tree and reduces 45-55% pollution under 15m radius

Mission Coffee of Nagaland
Tuophema village in Kohima district for Arabica coffee and
Ghotovi village in Niuland district for Robusta coffee.

Women and Men in India 2025 : by MoSPI
Sex ratio at birth : 904 (2017-19) to 917 (2021-23)
Total Fertility Rate: Urban 1.5 and Rural 2.1
Labour Force Participation Rate: at 15+ age
Rural females LFPR from 37.5% to 45.9%
GER trend at Higher education :
Female f 28.5 to 30.2
Male f 28.3 to 28.9

Citizenship (Amendment) Rules, 2026
Dual passport: Minor children can't hold Indian and foreign passport simultaneously.
e-OCI : The entire OCI application process, including registration, renunciation, and acknowledgements, will be conducted online through the official portal.

Jharkhand’s Swimmer Ishank Singh Sets World Record for Youngest and Fastest Palk Strait Crossing
Talaimannar (SL) to Dhanushkodi (TN) - 29km in 9h 50m

(MoPR) launched the ‘Panchayat Advancement Index (PAI) 2.0' (for fy 2024) -
Tripura tops among 27 states excluding WB (not participated) and 6 UTs excluding Delhi & Chandigarh (no GP)
Top performing GP - Jugal Kishore Nagar Village Committee, Tripura

India’s first green methanol production plant at Deendayal Port Authority in Kutch
where invasive Prosopis juliflora shrub, locally known as Gando Baval, will be converted into green marine fuel for ocean-going ships using advanced biomass gasification technology.

‘Future of India’s Semiconductor Industry’ Roadmap by NITI aayog
Aim - to build up 120-150B usd semiconductor value chain by 2035

India-Oman Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) officially came into force on June 01 2026
It Opens duty-free access for 99.38% of Indian exports to Oman

‘PMRC Scheme 2026’ covers 13 priority sector to bring accomplished Indian-origin researchers, scientists, technologists and professionals from around the world into India’s research and innovation ecosystem.
UNGA) elected 5 countries namely: Austria, Kyrgyzstan, Portugal, Trinidad and Tobago(T&T), and Zimbabwe, as non-permanent members of the 15-member United Nations Security Council

India & Japan Adopt Rules for Joint Crediting Mechanism.
Under this (Article 6.2 of the Paris Agreement) countries can cooperate through the transfer of internationally recognized carbon credits to achieve climate goals.

India will host 1st IBCA Summit 2026
For Conservation Of 7 Big Cats namely 1. Tiger 2. Lion 3. Leopard 4. Snow Leopard 5. Cheetah 6. Jaguar 7. Puma

Renewable Energy Capacity
o 1st → China (2258.02 GW)
o 2nd → United States (467.92 GW)
o 3rd → India {Total 250.52 GW}

According To NCRB’s Crime In India 2024 Report
Highest Violent Crime Rate → Odisha
Lowest Overall Crime Rate → Nagaland

PM MITRA (Mega Integrated Textile Region & Apparel) park
Under PM MITRA Scheme: 7 Textile Parks Will Be Setup In → TN, Telangana, Gujarat, Karnataka, MP, UP, Maharashtra
Total Outlay — ₹4,445 crore
1st park in Warangal, Telangana
